arcadeGameWrongFruitDesc: Guide a hungry garden worm through short garden sessions. Eat fruits with the right answers; dodge hedges, rocks, and hostile garden gnomes.
gameAiErrorBrowser: The learning helper isn’t ready yet. Turn on dynamic mode in Sage (desktop or expert API mode).
gameAiWebUnavailable: Dynamic mode on the web requires expert mode with an API or the desktop app.
gameAiErrorInitFailed: The learning helper could not finish starting.
gameAiErrorLead: Nothing is wrong on your side. You can try again in a moment.
gameConsentAiNotice: This game uses optional dynamic mode. If you accept, {model} (~{mb} MB) downloads from Hugging Face.
gameCrashedLead: Game player, loading issue. You didn't do anything wrong.

gameRecommendedHintFallback: Recommended interactive practice for this topic.
